Contact Rare & Manuscript Collections

Visual Services / Cornell Publications Photography records, [ca. 1960-1989]
Collection Number: 4-3-1885

Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University Library

DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY

Title:
Visual Services / Cornell Publications Photography records, [ca. 1960-1989]
Repository:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Collection Number:
4-3-1885
Abstract:
Slides of Cornell University buildings, classrooms, students, alumni, professors, athletics, and other Cornell and Ithaca, New York subjects and scenes. Photographs, ca. 1960-1980; 35 mm. black and white transparencies of historical campus photographs; 2 x 2 black and white and color slides, some identified; 35 mm. and 2 x 2 negatives, with guide; and contact sheets of prints and negatives; 8 x 10 photographs of the Theory Center; 35 mm. slides of Roberts Hall; 35 mm. slides of Maplewood Park.
Creator:
Cornell University. Publications Photography
Quanitities:
19 cubic feet.
Language:
Collection material in English
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY

The Office of Visual Services was formed in the early 1960s. By the mid 1980s it was called the Cornell Office of University Relations-Visual Services. Subsequently the name was changed to Cornell University Office of Publications Services, and then to the Office of Cornell Publications.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION

Slides of Cornell University buildings, classrooms, students, alumni, professors, athletics, and other Cornell and Ithaca, New York subjects and scenes. Photographs, ca. 1960-1980; 35 mm. black and white transparencies of historical campus photographs; 2 x 2 black and white and color slides, some identified; 35 mm. and 2 x 2 negatives, with guide; and contact sheets of prints and negatives; 8 x 10 photographs of the Theory Center; 35 mm. slides of Roberts Hall; 35 mm. slides of Maplewood Park. Photographers included: Sol Goldberg, Russ Hamilton, and Charlie Harrington.
RELATED MATERIALS

See also Cornell University Office of Visual Services Protest Photographs, #4-3-2093.
Series I. Assignments

Boxes 14-17
Series II. Slides

Boxes 1-13
INFORMATION FOR USERS
Cite As:

Cornell University. Visual Services/Cornell Publications Photography records, #4-3-1885. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
SUBJECTS

Names:
Cornell University -- : Alumni and alumnae.
Cornell University -- : Athletics.
Cornell University -- : Buildings.
Cornell University -- : Pictorial works.
Cornell University -- : Athletics.
Places:
Ithaca (N.Y.) -- Pictorial works.
Form and Genre Terms:
Negatives.
Photographs.
Slides (photographs).
